questions.title: Two Sum Indices
questions.question: Given an integer array and a target value, return the indices of two different elements whose sum is equal to the target.

questions.title: First Duplicate Number
questions.question: Given an array of integers, find the first value that appears more than once while scanning from left to right.

questions.title: Move Zeroes To End
questions.question: Move all zero values in an array to the end while keeping the relative order of non-zero values unchanged.

questions.title: Maximum Subarray Sum
questions.question: Find the maximum possible sum of a contiguous subarray in an integer array that may contain negative numbers.

questions.title: Best Time To Buy And Sell Stock
questions.question: Given daily stock prices, find the maximum profit from one buy and one sell operation where buying must happen before selling.

questions.title: Valid Anagram
questions.question: Given two strings, determine whether the second string is an anagram of the first using character frequency counts.

questions.title: Valid Parentheses
questions.question: Given a string containing brackets, determine whether every opening bracket is closed in the correct order and type.

questions.title: Merge Two Sorted Arrays
questions.question: Given two sorted arrays, merge them into one sorted array using an efficient two-pointer approach.

questions.title: Binary Search In Sorted Array
questions.question: Given a sorted array and a target value, return the target index using binary search, or return -1 if it is absent.

questions.title: Find Missing Number
questions.question: An array contains distinct numbers from 0 to n with one number missing. Find the missing number.

questions.title: Intersection Of Two Arrays
questions.question: Given two arrays, return the unique values that appear in both arrays.

questions.title: Remove Duplicates From Sorted Array
questions.question: Given a sorted array, remove duplicates in place and return the count of unique elements.

questions.title: Majority Element
questions.question: Find the element that appears more than half the time in an array, assuming such an element always exists.

questions.title: Reverse A String In Place
questions.question: Given a character array, reverse it in place without using extra space proportional to the input size.

questions.title: Palindrome String Check
questions.question: Determine whether a string is a palindrome after ignoring spaces, punctuation, and character casing.

questions.title: Longest Common Prefix
questions.question: Given a list of strings, find the longest prefix shared by every string in the list.

questions.title: Contains Nearby Duplicate
questions.question: Given an array and an integer k, determine whether the same value appears at two indices whose distance is at most k.

questions.title: Single Number
questions.question: Every number in an array appears twice except one number. Find the number that appears only once.

questions.title: Count Set Bits
questions.question: Given a non-negative integer, count how many bits are set to 1 in its binary representation.

questions.title: Queue Using Two Stacks
questions.question: Design a queue data structure using two stacks and support enqueue, dequeue, and peek operations.

questions.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
questions.question: Given a string, find the length of the longest substring that contains no repeated characters.

questions.title: Group Anagrams
questions.question: Given a list of words, group together all words that are anagrams of each other.

questions.title: Top K Frequent Elements
questions.question: Given an array of integers and a number k, return the k values that appear most frequently.

questions.title: Product Of Array Except Self
questions.question: Return an array where each position contains the product of all input numbers except the number at that position, without using division.

questions.title: Three Sum
questions.question: Given an integer array, return all unique triplets whose values sum to zero.

questions.title: Container With Most Water
questions.question: Given heights of vertical lines, find two lines that can hold the maximum amount of water with the x-axis.

questions.title: Minimum Size Subarray Sum
questions.question: Given positive integers and a target sum, find the minimum length of a contiguous subarray whose sum is at least the target.

questions.title: Longest Repeating Character Replacement
questions.question: Given a string and k replacements, find the longest substring that can be made of the same character after at most k changes.

questions.title: Permutation In String
questions.question: Given two strings, determine whether one string contains any permutation of the other as a contiguous substring.

questions.title: Find All Anagram Windows
questions.question: Given a string and a pattern, return every start index where an anagram of the pattern appears in the string.

questions.title: Daily Temperatures
questions.question: For each day, return how many days must pass until a warmer temperature occurs, or zero if none exists.

questions.title: Evaluate Reverse Polish Notation
questions.question: Evaluate an arithmetic expression represented in reverse polish notation using a stack.

questions.title: Min Stack
questions.question: Design a stack that supports push, pop, top, and retrieving the minimum element in constant time.

questions.title: Search In Rotated Sorted Array
questions.question: Given a sorted array rotated at an unknown pivot, find the index of a target value in logarithmic time.

questions.title: Find Minimum In Rotated Sorted Array
questions.question: Given a rotated sorted array with unique values, find the minimum element in logarithmic time.

questions.title: Koko Eating Bananas Variant
questions.question: Given pile sizes and a time limit, find the minimum integer eating speed needed to finish all piles on time.

questions.title: Merge Intervals
questions.question: Given a list of intervals, merge all overlapping intervals and return the non-overlapping result.

questions.title: Insert Interval
questions.question: Given sorted non-overlapping intervals and a new interval, insert it and merge if necessary.

questions.title: Non Overlapping Intervals
questions.question: Given intervals, find the minimum number of intervals to remove so the rest do not overlap.

questions.title: Meeting Rooms Required
questions.question: Given meeting start and end times, find the minimum number of rooms required to schedule all meetings.

questions.title: Linked List Cycle
questions.question: Given a linked list, determine whether it contains a cycle using constant extra space.

questions.title: Reverse Linked List
questions.question: Reverse a singly linked list iteratively or recursively and return the new head.

questions.title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
questions.question: Merge two sorted linked lists into one sorted linked list by reusing existing nodes.

questions.title: Remove Nth Node From End
questions.question: Remove the nth node from the end of a linked list in one pass.

questions.title: Reorder Linked List
questions.question: Reorder a linked list by alternating nodes from the start and end without changing node values.

questions.title: Add Two Numbers As Lists
questions.question: Two linked lists represent non-negative integers in reverse order. Return their sum as a linked list.

questions.title: Copy List With Random Pointer
questions.question: Deep copy a linked list where each node has a next pointer and an arbitrary random pointer.

questions.title: LRU Cache
questions.question: Design a cache that supports get and put in constant time while evicting the least recently used key when full.

questions.title: Validate Binary Search Tree
questions.question: Given a binary tree, determine whether it satisfies the ordering rules of a binary search tree.

questions.title: Maximum Depth Of Binary Tree
questions.question: Find the maximum depth of a binary tree using recursive or iterative traversal.

questions.title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
questions.question: Return the node values of a binary tree grouped by level from top to bottom.

questions.title: Lowest Common Ancestor In BST
questions.question: Given a binary search tree and two nodes, find their lowest common ancestor.

questions.title: Binary Tree Right Side View
questions.question: Return the values visible when a binary tree is viewed from the right side.

questions.title: Diameter Of Binary Tree
questions.question: Find the length of the longest path between any two nodes in a binary tree.

questions.title: Balanced Binary Tree
questions.question: Determine whether every node in a binary tree has left and right subtree heights that differ by at most one.

questions.title: Serialize And Deserialize Binary Tree
questions.question: Design a way to convert a binary tree into a string and reconstruct the same tree from that string.

questions.title: Kth Smallest In BST
questions.question: Given a binary search tree and an integer k, return the kth smallest value in the tree.

questions.title: Build Tree From Traversals
questions.question: Construct a binary tree from preorder and inorder traversal arrays.

questions.title: Trie Insert Search Prefix
questions.question: Design a trie that supports inserting words, exact word search, and prefix search.

questions.title: Word Search In Grid
questions.question: Given a grid of letters and a target word, determine whether the word can be formed by adjacent cells without reusing a cell.

questions.title: Combination Sum
questions.question: Given candidate numbers and a target, return all unique combinations where chosen numbers sum to the target and may be reused.

questions.title: Subsets
questions.question: Given a set of distinct integers, return every possible subset.

questions.title: Permutations
questions.question: Given a list of distinct numbers, return every possible ordering of those numbers.

questions.title: Generate Valid Parentheses
questions.question: Given n pairs of parentheses, generate all combinations of well-formed parentheses.

questions.title: N Queens
questions.question: Place n queens on an n by n chessboard so that no two queens attack each other, and return all valid boards.

questions.title: Number Of Islands
questions.question: Given a grid of land and water cells, count how many connected land components exist.

questions.title: Clone Graph
questions.question: Given a reference node in an undirected connected graph, create a deep copy of the entire graph.

questions.title: Course Schedule
questions.question: Given course prerequisites, determine whether all courses can be completed without circular dependencies.

questions.title: Course Order
questions.question: Given course prerequisites, return one valid ordering to complete all courses, or an empty list if impossible.

questions.title: Rotting Oranges
questions.question: Given a grid of fresh and rotten oranges, find the minimum minutes needed for all fresh oranges to become rotten.

questions.title: Pacific Atlantic Water Flow Variant
questions.question: Given a matrix of heights, find cells from which water can flow to both of two opposite borders under non-increasing movement.

questions.title: Network Delay Time
questions.question: Given directed weighted edges and a starting node, find how long it takes for all nodes to receive a signal.

questions.title: Cheapest Flight Within Stops
questions.question: Given flights, prices, a source, destination, and maximum stops, find the cheapest valid route.

questions.title: Minimum Spanning Connection Cost
questions.question: Given points in a plane, connect all points with minimum total Manhattan distance.

questions.title: Alien Dictionary
questions.question: Given words sorted according to an unknown alphabet, derive one valid ordering of the alphabet characters.

questions.title: Climbing Stairs
questions.question: Given n steps and the ability to climb one or two steps at a time, count how many distinct ways exist to reach the top.

questions.title: House Robber
questions.question: Given money in houses arranged in a line, find the maximum amount that can be robbed without robbing adjacent houses.

questions.title: House Robber Circle
questions.question: Given houses arranged in a circle, find the maximum amount that can be robbed without robbing adjacent houses.

questions.title: Coin Change Minimum Coins
questions.question: Given coin denominations and an amount, find the minimum number of coins needed to make that amount, or report impossible.

questions.title: Coin Change Ways
questions.question: Given coin denominations and an amount, count how many combinations can form the amount.

questions.title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
questions.question: Given an integer array, find the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence.

questions.title: Longest Common Subsequence
questions.question: Given two strings, find the length of their longest subsequence that appears in both strings in order.

questions.title: Word Break
questions.question: Given a string and a dictionary of words, determine whether the string can be segmented into dictionary words.

questions.title: Decode Ways
questions.question: Given a digit string where numbers map to letters, count how many valid decodings exist.

questions.title: Unique Paths In Grid
questions.question: Given an m by n grid, count how many ways exist to move from the top-left to the bottom-right using only right and down moves.

questions.title: Minimum Path Sum
questions.question: Given a grid of non-negative costs, find the minimum cost path from top-left to bottom-right moving only right or down.

questions.title: Maximum Product Subarray
questions.question: Given an integer array, find the maximum product of any contiguous subarray.

questions.title: Partition Equal Subset Sum
questions.question: Given positive integers, determine whether they can be partitioned into two subsets with equal sum.

questions.title: Edit Distance
questions.question: Given two words, find the minimum number of insertions, deletions, and replacements needed to convert one into the other.

questions.title: Regular Expression Matching
questions.question: Implement pattern matching with dot and star operators where dot matches one character and star matches zero or more of the previous token.

questions.title: Median Of Two Sorted Arrays
questions.question: Given two sorted arrays, find the median of the combined sorted values in logarithmic time.

questions.title: Trapping Rain Water
questions.question: Given bar heights, compute how much rain water can be trapped between the bars.

questions.title: Largest Rectangle In Histogram
questions.question: Given histogram bar heights, find the largest rectangular area that can be formed inside the histogram.

questions.title: Sliding Window Maximum
questions.question: Given an array and window size k, return the maximum value in every contiguous window of size k.

questions.title: Minimum Window Substring
questions.question: Given two strings, find the shortest substring of the first string that contains every character required by the second string.

questions.title: Word Ladder
questions.question: Given a start word, end word, and dictionary, find the minimum number of one-letter transformations needed to reach the end word.

questions.title: Find Median From Data Stream
questions.question: Design a data structure that receives numbers one by one and returns the current median efficiently.

questions.title: Merge K Sorted Lists
questions.question: Given k sorted linked lists, merge them into one sorted linked list efficiently.

questions.title: Reverse Nodes In K Group
questions.question: Given a linked list and integer k, reverse nodes in groups of k while leaving a final short group unchanged.

questions.title: Burst Balloons
questions.question: Given balloon values, choose an order to burst them that maximizes the total score from neighboring values.
